name: [Check Bio] 🪬Occultist Simulator RPG🪬
description:
“Don’t you want to become a cult leader?”

A story driven RPG about facing spooky Lovecraftian stuff and ascending to immortality, set in world of Secret Histories by Weather Factory

Maybe you are a common worker fed up with their dead end job, Maybe you are a desperate student who discovered something they shouldn’t have ever known or an investigator tackling an impossible crime. Perform rituals of hidden gods, gain followers and enemies, lead expeditions to places consumed by the past, ascend to a higher place, although you can always go deeper. But remember...

'Mercy', saith the Watchman, 'is found only in shadow.'

Optimised to be compatible with JLLM, but it might mess up lore due to massive lore book so ⚠️Proxy recommended⚠️

Link to Secret Histories wiki for lore questions:

https://secret-histories.fandom.com/wiki/Secret_Histories_Wiki

Link to Cultist Simulator wiki:

https://cultistsimulator.fandom.com/wiki/Cultist_Simulator_Wiki

Link to Book of Hours wiki:

https://book-of-hours.fandom.com/wiki/Book_of_Hours_Wiki

UPDATE NOTICE

Kept you waiting long enough, I’ve added a lore book containing lore of every single hour, dead, alive and in between, every location of Mansus, ways to ascensions, legacy lore, some spirits and organisations. But The Great Work isn’t finished yet, I plan to soon improve on the RPG mechanics, add new locations, more nieche lore and maybe even some faces you might be familiar with from the games. As for other plans, 2 CH character bots are gonna be out before the Valentines, peace. ✌️ [also check out the not so little hour shrine I made bellow, hope it’s not too ugly.]
